source_chapters.source_title: Bāb 1 — On the Soul, the First Emanation (38 fusūl)
source_chapters.split_reason: 19,702w is 2.07x the extended upper bound (9,500); 3 eps land at ~6,567w each, comfortably mid-band. Thematic seams: setup of the kamal/tamm distinction (fusūl 1-13), critique of both disputants (fusūl 14-26), final synthesis on soul's status (fusūl 27-38).

source_chapters.source_title: Bāb 2 — On the First Intellect, the First Originator (9 fusūl)
source_chapters.split_reason: 3,730w is below tier band but within 1.5x range; fits as single short episode (no thematic seam justifies further fragmentation).

source_chapters.source_title: Bāb 3 — On Soul and Spirit, and Whether They Resemble the First (6 fusūl)
source_chapters.split_reason: 2,762w is below tier band; short coherent unit on a single question.

source_chapters.source_title: Bāb 4 — On Souls as Parts and Effects (8 fusūl)
source_chapters.split_reason: 2,671w is below tier band; tightly focused on partial-vs-universal souls.

source_chapters.source_title: Bāb 5 — That the Human Being Is the Fruit of the World (7 fusūl)
source_chapters.split_reason: 2,655w is below tier band; single anthropological argument.

source_chapters.source_title: Bāb 6 — On Motion, Stillness, and Form (9 fusūl)
source_chapters.split_reason: 2,340w is below tier band; cohesive treatment of cosmological dyads.

source_chapters.source_title: Bāb 7 — On the Divisions of the World (7 fusūl)
source_chapters.split_reason: 3,823w is below tier band but coherent as a single episode on human-as-microcosm and the four-jewel cosmology.

source_chapters.source_title: Bāb 8 — On Qadr and Destiny (24 fusūl)
source_chapters.split_reason: 8,376w sits squarely in the tier band (5,500–9,500); ideal single episode.

source_chapters.source_title: Bāb 9 — On the Law of Adam and the Trusteeship of Noah (33 fusūl)
source_chapters.split_reason: 14,299w narrowly exceeds 1.5x upper bound (14,250); splits cleanly at fasl 17 — natural seam between Adam's law and the speaker-prophets (fusūl 1-16) and Noah's role, the Qā'im, and the Great Resurrection (fusūl 17-33). Each episode lands at ~7,150w, mid-band.

source_chapters.source_title: Bāb 10 — Critique of al-Mahsul on Tawhid and the First Originator (16 fusūl)
source_chapters.split_reason: 6,748w sits in the tier band; al-Kirmani's closing critique of al-Mahsul belongs together as one finale episode.
